nasb.text: The alien who is among you shall rise above you higher and higher, but you will go down lower and lower.

esv.text: The sojourner who is among you shall rise higher and higher above you, and you shall come down lower and lower.

cnv.text: 住在你中間的寄居者必漸漸高升，比你高而又高；你必漸漸下降，低而又低。

ccb.text: “你们中间的外族人要日益兴旺，你们却要日渐衰微。
